app.name: Apple Music-like Lyrics
app.one_liner: A lyric display component library mimicking Apple Music's iPad interface, with native DOM, React, and Vue bindings.

screens.name: Lyric Display Screen
screens.purpose: Render animated, synchronized lyrics with dynamic fluid background effects matching Apple Music's aesthetic.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist lyric configuration or state to local storage or external service.

mvp_plan: week 1: Connect to amll-ttml-db for sample data
week 1: Integrate AMLL Core DOM component
acceptance_tests: Component renders correctly in supported browsers per documented requirements.
Lyric display synchronizes accurately with mock audio timeline using TTML input.
